# Comment line
generated/*.js linguist-generated
vendor/**      linguist-vendored
src/**         text

# Attribute with =true
build/*.js linguist-generated=true

# Unset attribute
lib/*.js -linguist-generated

# Attribute with =false
dist/*.js linguist-generated=false

# Attribute with custom value
docs/*.js custom=myvalue

# Multiple attributes on one line
output/*.js linguist-generated text auto

# Attribute with non-truthy value
tmp/*.js linguist-generated=other
